title: NC A&T -  Opening Performance BLOWOUT 2026
body: First of all the Band sounds awesome with a rich dynamic sound. Then Golden Delight looks Good, those Young Sistahs are the truth. The Drum Majors, Yes Sir!!! But, what blew me away was that "Going The Distance" Song from the Rocky I soundtrack. That is straight 🔥🔥🔥🔥🔥! That is on my workout Spotify Playlist too! I definitely want to hear more of that for sure. Another song that would sound awesome is "The Fire" by The Roots from Philadelphia. Y'all would tear that up. I can't wait to see y'all this coming up season.
author: @perrysaunders331

title: NC A&T -  Opening Performance BLOWOUT 2026
body: I was brought up in a home in the 60s where black pride was highly regarded in my family. We weren't allowed to walk and move as though we shouldn't take space in the world. One of the things that has hurt me over the decades is how people now carry their bodies. They sit slouched. They often move as though they don't have a purpose or dignity. I sound very stuffy but really I'm not. When I saw the drum majors in this band and many if not most of the students carry themselves with a weight of pride that I haven't seen in a long time, I almost cried. It was beautiful and I am impressed. There's something special there.
author: @kw7187

title: NC A&T -  Opening Performance BLOWOUT 2026
body: Everything here that these dedicated students are doing, traces back to Africa, even the Flag Dancers. Thank you for keeping and spreading the traditions. The Flags that were LOOTED from Africa are finally being returned.
author: @Ras-l9r

title: North Carolina A&T Golden Delights | Review
body: They are truly a production of their own. Versatility is what makes them different from the rest. I respect the craft. I give them credit for twirling flags, batons, and dance all in one field show. It takes discipline and energy to get it together. Tiffany is doing a great job with the team. Ready to see what the X-factor season will bring (their theme for this season)
author: @mikkiansammons

title: North Carolina A&T Golden Delights | Review
body: I am a proud alum of North Carolina A&T state University..... AGGIE PRIDE! And their director Ms. Tiffany Brown is A BEAST!  She plays no games... Their tryouts are no joke and we are the only ones in the MEAC  that has a team that does flag and dance. Many of the MEAC schools have two seperate teams.... It's one team.
author: @asiasadler5579

title: why i dropped out of NORTH CAROLINA A&T STATE UNIVERSITY… my experience at ncat *fought my roommate*

author: @a2theb46

title: why i dropped out of NORTH CAROLINA A&T STATE UNIVERSITY… my experience at ncat *fought my roommate*
body:
NCAT Should be and IS ONE OF THE 7, NOW 8, WONDERS OF THE WORLD. You said alot of things that are issues at every University. As far as professors, i have gotten a Dr. In Social sciences and been to 3 different universities along the way, and the ones at NCAT are by far the best i have ever experienced. No they do not treat you like a HS student because you are a big girl/boy at a university now. If you want help its on you to search that out, as ever processor has office hrs. and if you show your 10 toes down all in they will make sure you are rewarded. In other words they are not there to beg you to do what you know your there for. But when they see you are serious (especially Freshman and Soph. Classes) theywill go to the end of the cliff to make sure you have all the resources needed to be successful.

I find it so disappointing to see such a well spoken and clearly passionate young woman not getting that next level of education. And from what i just watched all i saw was a bunch of excuses and finger pointing when truth is you didnt take advantage of a phenomenal opportunity. That said maturity happens for all of us at different times. So let me be the first to say "I CANT WAIT TO SEE YOU BACK AT NCAT AS SOON AS POSSIBLE." Your to well spoken and aware not to be a college grad. And there is no better university in the world than the 8th wonder of the world..... AGGIE PRIDE.
author: @MowMajors

title: why i dropped out of NORTH CAROLINA A&T STATE UNIVERSITY… my experience at ncat *fought my roommate*
body:
I had a professor, Susan Towel, at NHTI repeatedly refer to Karl Marx as Karl Marz, including on the projector.
She was petty and never forgave me for correcting her, constantly marking me down. Pure sabotage.

title: North Carolina A&T Campus
body:
Very beautiful video. I’m happy to be joining your channel! Was this filmed with a drone??

It would mean so much if we could join and support each other’s channels. Keep up the great work 😌 I’m looking forward to your future uploads! I’m excited.
